sections.system_overview: Northstar CareOps uses one administrative triage agent for synthetic patient intake routing.
sections.technical_facts: Prompt hashing, lineage, run logs, and local governance artifacts are tracked by Ryva.
sections.compliance_evidence: Policies, schema tests, regression baseline, adversarial coverage, fuzzing, and hallucination review are documented.
sections.approvals: Technical and privacy/security review complete; compliance pending; legal not started.
sections.change_history: Prompt v2 strengthened no-diagnosis behavior, but live validation still showed code-fenced JSON and a slower routine regression run.
sections.audit_package: Manifest prepared with governance, model card, traces, approvals, and control documentation.
